name: temperature-softmax
prompt: A warm cartoon illustration showing knowledge distillation through temperature scaling. A large wise owl teacher stands next to a chalkboard showing softmax curves: one sharp peaked curve labeled 'hard targets' and one smooth spread curve labeled 'soft targets'. A small eager student bird watches. The soft curve has colorful knowledge particles flowing from it. No text in the image. Warm pastel colors, whimsical Kurzgesagt meets XKCD style, clean white background.

name: white-box-black-box
prompt: A warm cartoon illustration comparing white-box and black-box distillation. On the left, a transparent glass robot teacher with visible internal gears sharing all its mechanisms with a small student robot. On the right, an opaque dark robot teacher with only speech bubbles coming out, and a student robot learning only from the outputs. Split scene with a dotted line in the middle. No text in the image. Warm pastel colors, whimsical Kurzgesagt style, clean white background.

name: merging-methods-comparison
prompt: A warm cartoon illustration showing four different model merging methods as cooking metaphors. Four kitchen stations side by side: (1) simple averaging with equal portions being mixed, (2) weighted mixing with a scale, (3) SLERP interpolation shown as a curved path between two bowls on a sphere, (4) TIES-Merging shown as pruning ingredient conflicts before combining. Small chef characters at each station. No text in the image. Warm pastel colors, whimsical Kurzgesagt style, clean white background.

name: catastrophic-forgetting
prompt: A warm cartoon illustration of catastrophic forgetting. A cute brain character is walking on a balance beam: on one side labeled by icons of code, math, and general knowledge (slowly fading/dissolving), and on the other side bright new medical/domain knowledge growing. The brain looks worried as old skills evaporate while new ones appear. A safety net below made of regularization techniques. No text in the image. Warm pastel colors, whimsical Kurzgesagt style, clean white background.

name: ewc-rubber-bands
prompt: A warm cartoon illustration of Elastic Weight Consolidation. A network of nodes connected by springs and rubber bands. Important weights (larger nodes) have thick strong rubber bands pulling them back toward their original positions, while less important weights (smaller nodes) have thin loose bands allowing free movement. New task gradient arrows push all nodes, but the important ones resist more. No text in the image. Warm pastel colors, whimsical Kurzgesagt style, clean white background.

name: progressive-training-pipeline
prompt: A warm cartoon illustration of progressive training as a staircase journey. A small robot climbs stairs: each step represents a training stage, from broad general knowledge at the bottom to narrow domain expertise at the top. Each step is slightly smaller and more specialized. Books and data sources get more specific at each level. A curriculum schedule hangs on the wall. No text in the image. Warm pastel colors, whimsical Kurzgesagt style, clean white background.
